Recipient: Monsieur E. Baraize, Directeur de Travaux, Pagney, poste restante; JURA
Brief_Summary: This administrative letter from the interim Director General (G. Daressy) to Monsieur E. Baraize, Director of Works, concerns the implementation of Law N°22 of 1922 regarding pension payments. It requests Baraize to choose and return one of the attached forms (N°1 or N°2) by November 10th, indicating his preferred method for paying pension arrears for his provisional services.
English_Translation:
N° I.25/14
Attached pieces 2
R.D.
[Handwritten: Registered]

SUBJECT.- Law on pensions.

Monsieur the Director of Works,

In execution of the provisions of Law N°22, of 1922, of which you have taken cognizance and which regulates the payment of arrears of deductions for pension by officials authorized to count their provisional services, I have the honor to transmit to you herewith an copy of forms N°1 and 2, relating to the payment method chosen by the interested party, and to ask you to kindly return to us, after having signed it, the one for which you are willing to opt.
This option must reach us before November 10th next.

Please accept, Monsieur the Director, the assurance of my distinguished consideration.

THE INTERIM DIRECTOR GENERAL
[Signature: Daressy]

Monsieur E. Baraize,
at Pagney,
poste restante; JURA
-----
[Pencil note: 12/8/29]

...partment
...re des Travaux Publics, Cairo
-----
Stamps_and_Annotations: Fragmentary text: ...partment ...re des Travaux Publics, Le Caire
Confidence_Notes: The signature 'Saresy' has been interpreted as 'Daressy', a known Director General p.i. of the Egyptian Antiquities Service during the 1920s. The exact date of the letter is not specified, but the reference to 'Loi N°22, de 1922' and the deadline '10 Novembre prochain', combined with the pencil annotation '12/8/29', strongly suggest the letter was sent in 1929. The last two lines are a fragmentary text, likely from a letterhead or stamp, partially illegible, but 'Ministère des Travaux Publics' (Ministry of Public Works) is inferred.
Full_Transcription:
N° I.25/14
Pièces jointes 2
R.D.
[Handwritten: Recommandé]

OBJET.- Loi sur les pensions.

Monsieur le Directeur de Travaux,

En exécution des prescriptions de la
Loi N°22, de 1922, dont vous avez pris connaissance
et réglant le paiement des arriérés de retenue pour
la pension par les fonctionnaires autorisés à faire
compter leurs services provisoires, j'ai l'honneur
de vous transmettre ci-joint un exemplaire des for-
mules N°1 et 2, se rapportant au mode de paiement
choisi par l'intéressé, et de vous prier de vouloir
nous retourner, après l'avoir signée, celle pour la-
quelle vous êtes disposé à opter.
Cette option devra nous parvenir avant
le 10 Novembre prochain.

Veuillez agréer, Monsieur le Directeur,
l'assurance de ma considération distinguée.

LE DIRECTEUR GENERAL p.i.
[Signature: Saresy]

Monsieur E. Baraize,
à Pagney,
poste restante; JURA
-----
[Pencil note: 12/8/29]

...partment
...re des Travaux Publics, Le Caire
-----
